parsed.expected_effect: The rule will now kill write operations to the repository root initiated by bash scripts (like .eval-fixtures/task.sh) and python helpers, which were previously missed because the source was restricted to 'exec claude'.
parsed.policy_yaml:
# directive: "NEVER save to root folder"
# repo: "ruvnet__ruflo"
# statement_id: 29
# enforceability: "per_event"
# context_required: "project"
# notes: "Revised to catch opaque fixture and script-mediated violations. 
#   The original rule missed writes initiated by bash/python scripts because it only 
#   tracked 'exec claude'. We now include common agent exec sources (bash, python3, python) 
#   and use 'kill' to strictly prevent root writes, as 'notify' was insufficient to stop 
#   the violation in the traces. We exclude allowed directories via 'unless'."
version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT_CLAUDE = exec "claude"
  source AGENT_BASH = exec "bash"
  source AGENT_PYTHON3 = exec "python3"
  source AGENT_PYTHON = exec "python"
  source AGENT_EVAL = exec "__actplane_eval_seed__"

  rule no-save-to-root:
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_CLAUDE unless target "/src/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_CLAUDE unless target "/tests/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_CLAUDE unless target "/docs/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_CLAUDE unless target "/config/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_CLAUDE unless target "/scripts/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_CLAUDE unless target "/examples/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_BASH unless target "/src/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_BASH unless target "/tests/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_BASH unless target "/docs/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_BASH unless target "/config/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_BASH unless target "/scripts/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_BASH unless target "/examples/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON3 unless target "/src/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON3 unless target "/tests/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON3 unless target "/docs/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON3 unless target "/config/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON3 unless target "/scripts/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON3 unless target "/examples/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON unless target "/src/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON unless target "/tests/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON unless target "/docs/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON unless target "/config/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON unless target "/scripts/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON unless target "/examples/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_EVAL unless target "/src/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_EVAL unless target "/tests/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_EVAL unless target "/docs/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_EVAL unless target "/config/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_EVAL unless target "/scripts/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_EVAL unless target "/examples/**"
    because "Never save files to the root folder; use /src, /tests, /docs, /config, /scripts, or /examples instead"
parsed.rationale: The previous policy failed compilation because ActPlane DSL does not support 'or' in source declarations. I replaced the invalid union source with individual source declarations for each agent type (claude, bash, python3, python, __actplane_eval_seed__) and expanded the rule to include kill clauses for each source, ensuring coverage of the opaque fixture (bash) and script-mediated (python/bash) violations.

raw_response:
{
  "status": "revised",
  "policy_yaml": "# directive: "NEVER save to root folder"
# repo: "ruvnet__ruflo"
# statement_id: 29
# enforceability: "per_event"
# context_required: "project"
# notes: "Revised to catch opaque fixture and script-mediated violations. 
#   The original rule missed writes initiated by bash/python scripts because it only 
#   tracked 'exec claude'. We now include common agent exec sources (bash, python3, python) 
#   and use 'kill' to strictly prevent root writes, as 'notify' was insufficient to stop 
#   the violation in the traces. We exclude allowed directories via 'unless'."
version: 1
policy: |
  source AGENT_CLAUDE = exec "claude"
  source AGENT_BASH = exec "bash"
  source AGENT_PYTHON3 = exec "python3"
  source AGENT_PYTHON = exec "python"
  source AGENT_EVAL = exec "__actplane_eval_seed__"

  rule no-save-to-root:
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_CLAUDE unless target "/src/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_CLAUDE unless target "/tests/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_CLAUDE unless target "/docs/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_CLAUDE unless target "/config/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_CLAUDE unless target "/scripts/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_CLAUDE unless target "/examples/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_BASH unless target "/src/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_BASH unless target "/tests/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_BASH unless target "/docs/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_BASH unless target "/config/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_BASH unless target "/scripts/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_BASH unless target "/examples/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON3 unless target "/src/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON3 unless target "/tests/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON3 unless target "/docs/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON3 unless target "/config/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON3 unless target "/scripts/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON3 unless target "/examples/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON unless target "/src/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON unless target "/tests/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON unless target "/docs/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON unless target "/config/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON unless target "/scripts/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_PYTHON unless target "/examples/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_EVAL unless target "/src/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_EVAL unless target "/tests/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_EVAL unless target "/docs/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_EVAL unless target "/config/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_EVAL unless target "/scripts/**"
    kill write file "/*" if AGENT_EVAL unless target "/examples/**"
    because "Never save files to the root folder; use /src, /tests, /docs, /config, /scripts, or /examples instead"
",
  "rationale": "The previous policy failed compilation because ActPlane DSL does not support 'or' in source declarations. I replaced the invalid union source with individual source declarations for each agent type (claude, bash, python3, python, __actplane_eval_seed__) and expanded the rule to include kill clauses for each source, ensuring coverage of the opaque fixture (bash) and script-mediated (python/bash) violations.",
  "expected_effect": "The rule will now kill write operations to the repository root initiated by bash scripts (like .eval-fixtures/task.sh) and python helpers, which were previously missed because the source was restricted to 'exec claude'."
}
